calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-05-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause call for petition for name change.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, CSR: Leticia Perez
Petitioner: Jose Luis Cardoza
Petitioner was sworn and examined.
The court grants decree changing name to: Plutarco Cardoza Sianez
Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-12-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Petitioner Jose Luis Cardoza present in pro per without proof of publication.
This matter is ordered off-calendar.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-09-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Janet Pond

Petitioner Jose Luis Cardoza appeared with no proof of publication. The matter is ordered off calendar by the court. Petitioner to obtain a new hearing date and publish.
